the diagram models the configuration process for adding vehicles.
the main flows involve the user interacting with the system to add a vehicle.
the system checks if the vehicle is already in the dataset and selects it if it is.
the user can access a list of distributions and view other diagrams.

the diagram models a simple user registration process with two possible outcomes: successful registration or not.
the process starts with an initial node "avvio app" and ends with a final node "avvio app".
the decision node "utente registrato con successo al servizio?" has two branches: "si" and "no".
the process involves two actors: "utente" and "servizio".
the diagram does not show any loops or repetitions.
